name: Off-The-Shelf Crockpot Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup mixed dried beans (17 bean types per package)
Enough water to fill the crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Add corn, sliced carrots, mixed dried beans, garlic, chives, parsley, basil, and salt to the crockpot.
2. Pour in 6 oz of canned V8.
3. Add enough water to fill the crockpot.
4. Stir gently.
5. Cook on high for 5-6 hours, or until beans are tender.
6. Add dry macaroni and cook for an additional 10-20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until macaroni is soft.
